core_mechanism: stabilization of otherwise-free continuous parameters by pinning them to isolated critical points of a potential whose shape is fixed by discrete, quantized choices, turning a continuum of configurations into a countable ensemble of stable states that can then be enumerated statistically
brief_reason: The abstract centers on flux vacua, moduli stabilization scenarios, and the statistics of flux vacua, i.e. using discretely quantized fluxes to lock free moduli at extrema of a potential and then counting the resulting discrete set of stable configurations.
